# Documentation Checklist

## Purpose Review

- What kind of document is this?
- Who is the audience?
- Is the current source of truth obvious?

## Accuracy Review

- Do commands and examples still work?
- Does the doc reflect the current system?
- Is there overlap with another document?

## Governance Review

- Who owns updates?
- Is stale content archived or removed?
- Can a new contributor find this doc when needed?
